title: Full date selection UI for "New item" module in "My Work" board
excerpt: Hello! Loving Monday, and I think I found a quality-of-life update for users. I use the “New item” button in the “My Work” board pretty regularly, it’s my go-to for quickly assigning an item to any teammate on any board. …

posts.author: gabrielalvmil (Gabe A-M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! Loving Monday, and I think I found a quality-of-life update for users. I use the “New item” button in the “My Work” board pretty regularly, it’s my go-to for quickly assigning an item to any teammate on any board.

The “Select a date” dropdown doesn’t use the full date-selection calendar available though - there are only 4 relative dates to choose from:

image938×528 28.9 KB

This often means I have to pick the closest (but not actual) date for an item, then navigate to the relevant board and use the calendar to choose the actual date.

It would be handy to get the full calendar in the “New item” module! Thanks in general though for a great product.
